sections.text: A minimum of 75% attendance is required in every course to be eligible to sit for the end-semester examination. Medical exemptions require documentation submitted within 7 days.
Courses are graded on a 10-point scale. The minimum passing grade is D (4 points). SGPA and CGPA are computed as credit-weighted averages.
Course registration opens two weeks before each semester. Late registration incurs a fine of Rs 500 per day up to a maximum of one week.
Mid-semester exams are held in week 8. End-semester exams begin two weeks after the last instruction day. Re-evaluation requests close 10 days after results.
Books may be borrowed for 14 days and renewed twice if no holds exist. Overdue fines are Rs 5 per day per book.
